TPGS Storage Conditions for 3/9/2026 -- INTRADAY


Notice Text:

Due to intraday nomination changes for Gas Day March 9, 2026, the following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day March 9, 2026:

Tres Palacios has scheduled and sealed injections. No increases in injections will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.


BackPrint

messages.content: You are a structured data extraction assistant. Extract information from HTML documents and return only valid JSON. Be precise and thorough.

Extract these fields from the HTML notice as JSON: - title: The main notice title/subject - noticeType: Type of notice (Maintenance, Capacity Constraint, Force Majeure, etc.) - status: Initiate, Supersede, or Cancel - postedDate: When notice was posted (ISO 8601) - effectiveDate: When notice takes effect (ISO 8601) - endDate: When notice expires (ISO 8601, null if none) - description: Main content/body of the notice (cleaned text, not HTML) - affectedLocations: List of affected locations/meters if mentioned - responseRequired: true if response is required, false otherwise Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown or explanation. HTML Content:
